data.title: 国际服活动「Business Trip! Momoyodou Beach Shack Franchise Plan」青辉石礼物

data.body:
Sensei, Thanks to your effort, Momoyodou Beach Shack’s franchise plan is now on track!
Here are the appreciation gifts Shizuko has prepared for you. Check your mailbox and receive Pre-Registration Event rewards!💙
